title.en: Ye Tian made a move and killed the Ghost Shadow...

content.en:
Ye Tian made a move and killed the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor and the Dark Ghost Domain Ancestor.

These two four-star kings are already seriously injured at the moment, and their combat power is not much, where can they block Ye Tian's attack?

Burst!

A void slash slashed towards the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor, the void was locked, and the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor couldn't dodge it at all, so he could only take this blow hard.

The Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor urged a defensive holy relic on his body with all his might, and used a defensive holy technique to try to resist Ye Tian's attack.

However, Ye Tian's attack that blessed the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm was not something that the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor could resist at all.

In an instant, the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor was cut in two, but under the protection of the life-preserving thing, his life was forcibly saved, so that the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor did not fall.

But they can't escape, no matter how advanced the life-saving thing is, it's useless.

Soon, the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor couldn't support it first, and his soul was shattered by Ye Tian's Zhen Divine Technique, and his body was cut into pieces.

In a short period of time, the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor was annihilated, his soul was completely shattered, he could no longer heal, and he completely fell and died.

As soon as the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor died, the Dark Shadow Domain Ancestor couldn't hold on, and soon followed in the footsteps of the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor.

At this point, all the Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Ghost Fox Organization that attacked Ye Tian had fallen.

Of course, the Ghost Fox Organization may still have the strongest domain ancestors staying in the Xuanxu Saint Realm, but the top of these supreme domain ancestors have all fallen, and at most there are some ordinary domain ancestors left, which is not a threat.

This battle fluctuated greatly, so it had already attracted the attention of other domain ancestors.

In fact, there were Supreme Domain Ancestors who came before, but Ye Tian blocked the Void, and these Supreme Domain Ancestors did not dare to break the Void Blockade, otherwise they would be enemies with Ye Tian.

At this moment, Ye Tian lifted the void blockade, and a powerful domain ancestor appeared.

Among them, the herring domain ancestor is also among them.

"Ghost Shadow Ancestor, Dark Shadow Domain Ancestor......"

The Blue Fish Domain Ancestor was immediately surprised when he saw the corpse of a Supreme Domain Ancestor.

Among them, the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor and the Dark Ghost Domain Ancestor are the well-known Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Dark Sacred Domain, and their strength is not weaker than the Domain Ancestors on the Holy Gate Supreme Strength List, and they alone are not much weaker than her.

If the two of them work together, even she is not necessarily an opponent.

Moreover, the Ghost Fox Organization also sent so many Supreme Domain Ancestors, but they were all killed by Ye Tian in a short period of time.

At this moment, Ye Tian's strength refreshed the cognition of the Qingyu Domain Ancestor.

The other domain ancestors were also shocked, as if they had reacquainted Ye Tian.

"The strength of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor is too terrifying!"

Many domain ancestors were secretly amazed.

However, some Supreme Domain Ancestors had also watched Ye Tian's battle just now and sensed the surge of the Xuanxu Saint Realm's Origin Power.

Obviously, Ye Tian mobilized the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, and this was the only way to exert such terrifying strength.

"It's strange, even the Lord of the Holy Realm can't mobilize how much power a Holy Realm has, it's very good to be able to double the increase in strength, why can the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain increase so much strength?"

The Ancestor of the Blue Fish Domain was curious.

However, she would not ask Ye Tian, that must have involved Ye Tian's secret.

"I've seen the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain!"

"I've seen the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain!"

"I've seen the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain!"

When a domain ancestor arrived, they all said respectfully, their tones full of awe.

After all, the Dark Sanctuary was respected for its strength and status, and Ye Tian had a very high status and strength, so they naturally didn't dare to be disrespectful.

Ye Tian didn't bother to pay attention to these domain ancestors, and casually dealt with a few words, and let them leave.

And he disposed of the corpses of these ghost fox organizations, and then came to the front of the Qingyu Domain Ancestor and talked to him.

"Can the Ancestor of the Blue Fish Domain know about the Ghost Fox Organization?"

Ye Tian asked.

Although he knew that these domain ancestors were from the Ghost Fox Organization, he actually didn't know much about the Ghost Fox Organization.

"I know a little!" "The Blue Fish Domain Ancestor nodded, "There are many members of the Ghost Fox Organization, some of them are public, but some of the Domain Ancestors are very mysterious, no one knows their identities, and almost all of them are cultivated in secret. It is even rumored that some members of the Ghost Fox Organization have infiltrated the Holy Land and even the Holy Gate. Of course, this is just a rumor, but it is not necessarily true! But in any case, the overall strength of the Ghost Fox Organization is definitely not weaker than a holy land, the leader of the Ghost Fox Organization is a Superior Domain Ancestor, and there are many invincible Domain Ancestors, and there are even more Supreme Domain Ancestors, and that large number of Supreme Domain Ancestors are also the middle force of the Ghost Fox Organization!"

Then, the Blue Fish Domain Ancestor added: "Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, the Domain Ancestor of the Ghost Fox Organization attacked you, and the Battle Gate may suppress the Ghost Fox Organization, but don't expect too much." After all, you're fine, and the Ghost Fox Organization has fallen a lot of Supreme Domain Ancestors, and they have also fallen two four-star kings who are comparable to the Supreme Strength Domain Ancestor level, and they have suffered even greater losses. Therefore, it is impossible for the Battle Gate to suppress the Ghost Fox Organization for you. Moreover, the Ghost Fox Organization still has the support of the ancestor behind it, and it is impossible for the battle gate to make an easy move. What's more, now that the Holy Gates are fiercely competing with each other, and the contradictions are relatively large, they will not care about it!"

"Got it!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The Ancestor of the Blue Fish Domain thought that Ye Tian would forget it, but she underestimated Ye Tian's anger.

-----------------

War Tower.

Ye Tian contacted the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate and informed the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor of his attack.

However, he didn't ask Zhanmen to do anything, but asked Zhanmen to collect information about the Ghost Fox Organization, such as which four-star kings and four-star masters the Ghost Fox Organization has.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, you want to take revenge on the Ghost Fox Organization?"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor frowned and asked.

"Revenge doesn't count, I'm not qualified to retaliate against the Ghost Fox Organization, I just want to learn from some of the Ghost Fox Organization's Supreme Domain Ancestors!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

It's true that you can test your combat power, and you can also kill the strongest domain ancestor of the ghost fox organization.

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor could see at a glance that Ye Tian wanted to kill the Supreme Domain Ancestor of the Ghost Fox Organization, and immediately reminded: "Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, don't underestimate the Supreme Domain Ancestor of the Ghost Fox Organization, although you killed two four-star kings, but with the help of the power of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, in terms of true strength, you are not much stronger than the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor." Once you do that, the Ghost Fox Organization will kill you at all costs!"

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, I want to know, can the Battle Gate guarantee that the Invincible Domain Ancestor and the Supreme Domain Ancestor of the Ghost Fox Organization will not make a move?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor assured: "As one of the ten holy gates, our battle gate is still one of the ten holy gates, this deterrent power is still there, if you fight with the strongest domain ancestor of the ghost fox organization in the name of learning, the battle gate will issue a statement, the invincible domain ancestor and the supreme domain ancestor will not be allowed to interfere, the ghost fox organization will definitely not dare to dispatch the invincible domain ancestor, otherwise they will be looking for death! However, we can't help you resist their supreme domain ancestor, you have to think clearly!"

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, my clone is special, I said this is the main body, they can't recognize it, so I won't fall!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Only then did the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor suddenly realize, and immediately agreed.

Even if Ye Tianzhen fell, it would just be the loss of a clone, and it would not be a big deal.

Shortly thereafter, the battle gate issued a statement.

It shows that the Ghost Fox Organization attacked the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate, and soon the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors will challenge the strongest Domain Ancestors of the Ghost Fox Organization, and the invincible Domain Ancestors and the Superior Domain Ancestors on both sides of the Ghost Fox Organization and the Battle Gate cannot make a move.

The Battle Gate issued this statement, and the Ghost Fox Organization was furious on the spot.
